name: Sparinvest SICAV - Equitas
summary: Sparinvest SICAV - Equitas is an open-ended equity mutual fund launched by Sparinvest S.A. The fund is managed by Sparinvest Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. It invests in the public equity markets across the globe. The fund invests in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. It invests in value and momentum stocks of small cap companies. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI World Index. Sparinvest SICAV - Equitas was formed on May 30, 2008 and is domiciled in Luxembourg.
